commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Protected maintainer labeling and overlapping Discord progress PRs make this a human merge-order review rather than an automated repair lane.; Cleared: The diff only moves Discord TypeScript reasoning formatting logic and adds tests; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, secrets, package metadata, or executable supply-chain surfaces. (sha=7bf85a82ad2442551cfd0b92d0b38de145c3e8d9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR passes raw Discord reasoning stream text into the progress draft accumulator, formats only the merged progress line, tightens Thinking snapshot detection, and adds Discord progress regression tests.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +85. Total +86 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main source path shows Discord formatting reasoning text before draft-preview merge, and the PR adds focused tests plus redacted live Discord proof for accumulated deltas.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer labeling and overlapping Discord progress PRs make this a human merge-order review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(discord): accumulate reasoning progress deltas
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #83983.

Discord progress-mode reasoning updates were formatting each reasoning callback with the display `Thinking...` wrapper before draft-preview merge logic saw it. Since the merge logic treats `Thinking...`/`Reasoning:` prefixed text as a full snapshot, Codex app-server delta chunks like `"Considering"`, `" plugin"`, `" installation"`, `"!"` could replace each other until only the final tiny chunk remained visible.

This keeps reasoning stream payloads raw until `pushReasoningProgress()` merges delta/snapshot semantics, then applies the existing reasoning display formatter once for the stable progress line. The follow-up also tightens the `Thinking` snapshot detector so raw reasoning text that naturally starts with `Thinking` is preserved and appended instead of being stripped or treated as a replacement snapshot.

No config surface or plugin surface changes.

## Proof

```sh
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts --reporter=dot
# Test Files 3 passed (3)
# Tests 206 passed (206)

./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# All matched files use the correct format.

./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
# passed

git diff --check
# passed

/home/giodl/.local/toolchains/node-v22.22.3-linux-x64/bin/codex review --base origin/main
# No actionable correctness issues were found.
```

Signed follow-up commit: `7bf85a82ad2442551cfd0b92d0b38de145c3e8d9`.
